blockingIssues.description: MockAppStateProvider stores app state from the value prop once and never re-syncs when the prop changes, causing stale demo state to leak across /demo/:scenarioId navigation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that agent-browser is required only for UI surfaces; allow non-UI architecture/provider fixes to pass validation with automated tests and non-browser verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for misc-bridge-hydrated-reset identified conflicting ui-builder guidance: non-UI feature support versus mandatory agent-browser usage.
